feat: rewrite GitHub Actions workflow for full production pipeline

- Decode base64 secrets to credentials.json / token.json at runtime
- Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and DASHBOARD_URL env vars
- Add permissions: contents: write for push-back step
- Commit docs/index.html back to repo after each run ([skip ci])

  (optional — skips gracefully if GH_PAT is not configured)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Full UI overhaul + JWT refresh tokens (Sprints 1-7) (#2)

Sprint 1 — Design System:
- pubspec.yaml: Add google_fonts ^6.2.1
- theme.dart: New color palette (Vitalis Teal #1A6B5C, Amber #D97706,
  Indigo #4F46E5), Plus Jakarta Sans font via GoogleFonts.plusJakartaSansTextTheme,
  NavigationBarThemeData for M3 nav bar, both light + dark factories

Sprint 2 — Navigation Overhaul:
- app_shell.dart: Remove Drawer + 5-tab BottomNavigationBar; add M3
  NavigationBar with 4 tabs (Home/Nutrition/Health/Grocery); profile access
  via tappable _PersonCard in AvatarBar (_SoloTopBar for no-family users);
  circular swipe via modular arithmetic
- router.dart: Remove /analytics route; add /health/* sub-routes for all
  8 health categories; update ShellRoute tab dispatch to 4 routes

Sprint 3 — Home Screen (merged Dashboard + Analytics):
- dashboard_screen.dart: Full rewrite as scrollable HomeScreen; period
  selector chips (Today/7d/30d) drive both dashboard + analytics data;
  new sections: VitalityHeroCard, HydrationQuickLog (inline POST), WeeklyTrends
  (embedded LineChart from analyticsProvider), GrocerySnapshot; uses AppCache
  for offline-first data
- analytics_screen.dart: Deleted (content embedded in HomeScreen)

Sprint 4 — Health Screen Card Grid:
- health_screen.dart: Replace 7-tab TabBar with 2-column GridView of 8
  _HealthCard items (Symptoms/Medications/Vitals/Sleep/Exercise/Mood/Weight/Eczema);
  each card taps to /health/<category> sub-route; HealthSubScreen class wraps
  individual tab widgets for sub-route display

Sprint 6 — JWT Refresh Tokens (Flutter side):
- constants.dart: Add tokenRefresh = '/api/token/refresh'
- secure_storage.dart: Add saveRefreshToken/getRefreshToken/clearRefreshToken
- api_client.dart: Silent token refresh interceptor — on 401, tries
  POST /api/token/refresh with stored refresh_token; on success saves new
  access_token and retries original request; on failure clears both tokens
- auth_provider.dart: Save refresh_token after login/register; clear on logout

Co-authored-by: Kalyan <kalyan@vitalis.app>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add AI model scanner — discovers useful models across providers

New module research/src/model_scanner.py scans HuggingFace, Ollama,
and OpenRouter for models that fill capability gaps in our registry.
Scores models against 13 desired capabilities (embedding, tool-use,
vision, multilingual, planning, etc.) and classifies as integrate/
test/monitor/skip.

First scan found 258 models, 20 integrate candidates including:
- Gemini 3.1 Pro, Qwen3 VL 8B, Nemotron Super 49B (agentic/RAG)
- Arcee Trinity, Mistral Small 3.1 (free tier)
- DeepSeek V3.2 (tool-use), UI-TARS 7B (planning)

CLI: python -m research.src.cron --models

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
v4.7.0: Bump version for release

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Allow re-initialization of vault after execution

Add close_executed_vault_by_owner on-chain instruction so the owner
can close an executed vault's PDAs (VaultConfig, HeartbeatRecord,
ExecutionLog) and re-initialize a new vault on the same wallet.

Previously, executed vaults blocked re-initialization with
"This vault has already been executed and cannot be re-used."

- Add close_executed_vault_by_owner instruction (owner-signed)
- Add buildCloseExecutedAndReinitVaultTx in VaultTransactionService
- Update EstateReviewScreen to atomically close+reinit executed vaults
- Deploy updated program to devnet
- Bump version to 1.4.1 / versionCode 41

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: DMV
repository.description: Dead Man's Vault (DMV) is an autonomous crypto inheritance protocol for Solana Seeker. It monitors the owner's liveness via configurable heartbeat checks. When heartbeats cease, it escalates through a 4-stage warning system and then autonomously distributes assets to pre-configured beneficiaries.

Fix 7 DSP failures causing thin, bright masters (v9.4.0)

- Eliminate stacked lowmid cuts: eqCurves reduced from -1.5/-2.5 to 0/-0.5 dB
- Fix AdvancedLimiter ceiling: worklet default -0.3 → -1.0 dBTP to match constructor
- Raise warmth to professional levels: 5% → 14% wet at intensity 3/pop
- Reduce genre preset lowmid cuts: Hip-Hop -3→-1, EDM -2→-0.5, Metal -2→-0.5
- Lower processingScale floor: 0.75 → 0.50 for well-mastered tracks
- Halve post-limiter air EQ: +0.8→+0.3 dB to prevent brightness tilt
- Gentler multiband defaults: 5ms→15ms attack, 4:1→3:1 ratio, softer knee

commit.message:
feat: add production-grade monitoring and resilience infrastructure

- ProcessMonitor: real-time process health tracking and metrics
- CheckpointManager: operation state persistence and recovery
- RecoveryManager: automatic failure recovery and retry logic
- RetryPolicy: configurable retry strategies with backoff
- TaskQueue: priority-based task scheduling and execution
- MetricsCollector: performance metrics aggregation
- Logger: structured logging with rotation
- ErrorBoundary: React error boundary for graceful degradation
- ProcessMonitorDashboard: real-time monitoring UI
- monitoring API routes: health checks and metrics endpoints

Enables long-running operations with automatic recovery and observability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace auth callback with direct exchangeCodeForSession + getSession approach

Removes the complex multi-path logic that was silently failing. New flow:
1. exchangeCodeForSession(code) if ?code= present
2. getSession() to confirm session exists
3. onAuthStateChange as safety net for SIGNED_IN
Console logs every step so failures are visible in Vercel logs.

commit.message:
Sync marksAvailable/answer from master to clone before marking

When a clone is marked, its questions may have stale marksAvailable
values copied at clone-creation time. If the parent later edits the
master (e.g. changing MCQ from 1 to 2 marks), the clone still had
the old value, causing the AI to use wrong scoring.

Fix: before marking, sync marksAvailable, answer, and answerImageData
from the master paper's questions to the clone's questions. This
ensures marking always uses the latest values the parent set.

commit.message:
fix(short-interest): override PostgREST 1000-row ceiling on RPC

PostgREST silently caps SETOF RPC results at 1000 rows regardless
of the row_limit SQL parameter. Chain .limit(limit) on the RPC call
so the client sends the correct Range header, allowing all 1600
tickers to be returned.

commit.message:
Weight adjusted efficiency by opponent games played

Opponent quality averages are now weighted by each opponent's games
played, so high-sample teams pull more weight than teams with only
a handful of games. Reduces noise from early-season small-sample
opponents inflating or deflating efficiency ratings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(report-to-lark+mdx-parse): fix Feishu card updates and harden MDX patcher

**report-to-lark:** patchCard() used PUT instead of PATCH and included msg_type
in the body. The Feishu patch-card API is PATCH /im/v1/messages/{id} with body
{ content } only — the wrong method caused all --card-advance calls to silently
fail, leaving the card frozen at its initial state for the entire run.

**mdx-parse:** same mdxPatcher.js hardening as applied to dev:
- Add removeTabsHallucinations() pre-processing step
- Add unescapeKnownJsxTags() pre-processing step
- Guard end-tag-mismatch fallback against escaping known JSX components

All use GitHub Models API (gpt-4o-mini) with built-in GITHUB_TOKEN.
